DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR THOMAS MASON CARNES.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, BRENDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSE, PETER $40,936.89 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40,936.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
